hero.description: I'm a web designer and developer from Liberia. I craft personalized websites to assist businesses in establishing a strong online presence.

about.title: About Me
about.greeting: Greetings! I'm a passionate web developer and designer from Liberia with a keen eye for creating beautiful, functional websites that help businesses establish a strong online presence.
about.experience: With 8 months of dedicated study and hands-on experience, I've developed expertise in modern web technologies and design principles.
about.missionText: My mission is to empower businesses and individuals by creating exceptional digital experiences that drive growth and engagement.
